name: Vapman Cooling Spiral
summary: Vapman Cooling Spiral — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Enhance every Vapman session with the Vapman Cooling Spiral, a precision-engineered accessory that delivers smoother, cooler, and more flavorful draws. Designed for effortless installation, it extends the vapour path to gently lower temperature without compromising purity or taste. The extended spiral airflow design allows vapour to travel a longer route, naturally cooling it before reaching your lips. This results in a softer, more enjoyable inhale — ideal for users who value comfort and clean flavour from their dry herb sessions. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
